{{Infobox location
| name = Oasis
| introduced = cradle-09-bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Oasis]] is an [[Abidan]] [[Iteration]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Oasis]] is composed of thousands of islands.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Oasis]]' central planet is a blue marble.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The clash between [[Makiel]]'s [[sword]] and the Scythe blasted a crater in the central planet of [[Oasis]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Otherworldly locations]]
